## What & why

Briefly, what does this change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `cd server && python -m security_review --ci` exits 0 (no blockers)
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or it's justified in the description)
- [ ] No personal/real data added to code (the personal-data audit stays clean)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Added/updated a test for new behavior
